creator: vipulkit@gmail.com
text:
when trying to install FreeBSD ( Release 6.1 both i386 and amd64 ) from a Bootable CD the Kernel boots in the first instance
then detects Some ISA VGA devices like 

"VGA0 : <Generic ISA VGA > at port 0x3c0-3x3df............."
          my system has no ISA slots

          then kernel panic occur after this line.....

"panic : ohci_add_done addr 0x000cdd10 not found "
"uptime : 1s"
"Automatic Reboot in Progress"

How-To-Repeat: Problem occur every time when try to install 

OpenBSD and FreeBSD from installation media CDROM

i386 and amd64
